title: A Town That Loves Pirates
description: On pages 6–8, a town that loves pirates as after facing the Grand Line’s bizarre weather, the crew reaches Whiskey Peak and is greeted with suspicious enthusiasm.
scene: A Town That Loves Pirates. After facing the Grand Line’s bizarre weather, the crew reaches Whiskey Peak and is greeted with suspicious enthusiasm. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, I see a Dolphin jumping over there! Let's go check it out!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What is wrong with this ocean!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's water leaking in the lower deck!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hurry up and seal it up then!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The clouds are moving too fast!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We've got another leak on the lower deck!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nami, where's the compass pointing to now!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah, that was a nice nap.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, come on now. I know the weather's nice and warm but don't you think you're being a bit too lazy?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you sure we're going the right away?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And why're you two on our ship?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're headed towards their town right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What, so we're giving them a ride? It's not like we're obligated to or anything.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on a town that loves pirates. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
